nodes.label: Multi-tenancy hotel_id Scoping Pattern
nodes.rationale: Every Supabase query must scope to tenant via .eq('hotel_id', user.hotel_id). RLS is a second safety layer, not a substitute.

nodes.label: RBAC Roles (housekeeper, engineer, housekeeping_supervisor, chief_engineer, front_desk, gm)
nodes.norm_label: rbac roles (housekeeper, engineer, housekeeping_supervisor, chief_engineer, front_desk, gm)

nodes.label: Supabase Realtime Scope — 3 Surfaces Only
nodes.rationale: Realtime only on Housekeeping Breakout Board, Engineering Work Orders, AI Service Recovery. Other screens use pull-to-refresh to avoid WebSocket overhead.

nodes.label: Services Layer Depth (A1) — Keep Logic in Routers
nodes.rationale: Business logic stays in domain routers; only extracted to services/ when shared across 2+ domains. Flat architecture preserves AI context window.
nodes.norm_label: services layer depth (a1) — keep logic in routers

nodes.label: AI Credit Accounting (A3) — Actual Token Usage
nodes.rationale: Middleware must log actual token usage from API responses, never fixed costs. Monthly Stripe true-up depends on this log.
nodes.norm_label: ai credit accounting (a3) — actual token usage

nodes.label: Opera Cloud Integration (A4) — Feature-Flagged
nodes.rationale: Opera integration is feature-flagged for pilot. App must function standalone first. Two-way sync hardening deferred.

nodes.label: pgvector RPC match_sop_chunks — match_hotel_id Param
nodes.rationale: Call match_sop_chunks() with param match_hotel_id — NOT hotel_id. This is a known gotcha from migration 018.

nodes.label: ARIA Modal Pattern (role=dialog, aria-modal, focus trap)
nodes.norm_label: aria modal pattern (role=dialog, aria-modal, focus trap)

nodes.label: Frosted Glass — Overlays Only (Cerebrum Rule)
nodes.rationale: Frosted glass (backdrop-blur) is for overlays only. Using it on inline list items or cards drops text contrast and violates cerebrum rule.

nodes.label: STATUS_BG Inline Style Bug — RoomStatusBoard
nodes.rationale: STATUS_BG values are Tailwind class strings, not hex colors. Using them as backgroundColor in style prop is invalid CSS — every status dot becomes invisible.

nodes.label: UTC Timezone Bug — Texas Hotels After 7PM
nodes.rationale: toISOString().split('T')[0] returns UTC date. After 7PM Central time, date math is wrong for Texas hotels. Must use local date arithmetic.
nodes.norm_label: utc timezone bug — texas hotels after 7pm

nodes.label: DO-NOT-REPEAT: Opera auth_code OAuth Redirect
nodes.rationale: Cerebrum explicitly bans the auth_code redirect flow for OHIP. Must use credential-based flow instead (client_id, client_secret, property_id collected directly).

nodes.label: Inspection History Exposes Raw UUIDs as Inspector Names
nodes.norm_label: inspection history exposes raw uuids as inspector names

nodes.label: Floating AI Button Overlaps Mobile Content
nodes.norm_label: floating ai button overlaps mobile content

nodes.label: Dashboard Stat Cards Never Resolve from Skeleton (C-01)
nodes.norm_label: dashboard stat cards never resolve from skeleton (c-01)

nodes.label: ambiguous Intent — Button Chips Instead of Text
nodes.norm_label: ambiguous intent — button chips instead of text

nodes.label: Mobile Voice Input — expo-speech-recognition (On-Device STT)
nodes.rationale: On-device STT via expo-speech-recognition charges 0 credits. Hold-to-record fills text input, then user taps send normally.

nodes.label: Credit Fast Path — Rule Engine (0 Credits at 0.90 Confidence)
nodes.rationale: Simple unambiguous requests skip the LLM entirely at confidence >= 0.90 using regex pattern matching. Shows same task preview. model_used: 'rule_engine'.
nodes.norm_label: credit fast path — rule engine (0 credits at 0.90 confidence)

nodes.label: OpenWolf Context Management System
nodes.rationale: OpenWolf provides persistent cross-session learning via anatomy.md (file index), cerebrum.md (learnings/do-not-repeat), memory.md (session log), and buglog.json (bug history).
